meaning: 维斯比[瑞典东南部港市](在哥特兰岛西岸)
examples: In shipping area, neither the Hague Rules nor the Hague-Visby Rules has this concept.
Nowadays there are three international maritime conventions in the world, which are the Hague rules, the Visby rules and the Hamburg rules.
The "Mode of Series Bills of Amendment to Hague-visby Rules" is an acceptable choice taking into consideration of the reality and application of law.
